failedAssertions.reason: Fail: an env-style probe redacted the command assignment but still rendered the emitted OPENAI_API_KEY placeholder value raw in both completed tool output and a settled transcript text block.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked: repeated same-run scroll probes, including a slower streaming command and the shipped follow-live key (`l`), still did not yield a conclusive capture of both the visible `newer lines below` indicator and its cleared return-to-live state.

appliedUpdates.description: Added deterministic TUI validation probes for tool-only transcript fallback, failed-turn validation by stopping the local listener mid-turn, env-style secret-redaction checks, and the shipped `l` follow-live key during transcript scrolling.
